ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the indicator */,
  "shortname" TEXT /* Short name of the indicator */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "categorycombo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category combination associated with the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the indicator was last updated */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the indicator */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the indicator */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the indicator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the indicator is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_categorycombo_id FOREIGN KEY ("categorycombo_id") REFERENCES category_combinations ("categorycombo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "category_combinations" (
  "categorycombo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category combination */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category combination */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category combination */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the category combination */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category combination */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category combination was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category combination is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("categorycombo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the region */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the region */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the region was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator the data point belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data was collected */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, clinical records) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data point */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data point is currently active */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population */,
  "mental_health_condition" TEXT /* Mental health condition of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health professional, researcher, admin) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the access log */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access log is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is currently active */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data_points" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link between a report and a data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the link */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the link */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the link was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the link is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_points_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_points_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)
